StructurePhase.Reference: Predmore R., Arsenault R.J., Scr. Metall., v4 p213 (1970)
StructurePhase.Comment: LPF Collection Code: 457969. Sample Preparation: Compound Preparation: crystals grown from the melt. Article Title: SHORT RANGE ORDER OF Ta-MO B.C.C. ALLOYS. Minor Warning: No e.s.d reported/abstracted on the cell dimension. No R factor reported/abstracted. LPF Editor Comment: editor deduced probable site occupation from nominal composition. Wyckoff Sequence: a. Unit Cell Data Source: Powder Diffraction.
